body:
Hey Amara, following up on our earlier exchange — I wanted to loop back on the [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) deal we were both looking at last week. Our team finished diligence on the grid orchestration layer and came away pretty impressed with how they've instrumented the demand-response logic, especially given where energy prices are trending in the ERCOT market. I know you had some reservations about the cap table structure after the seed extension, so I wanted to flag that the founders are open to a conversation about cleaning that up ahead of a Series A syndicate. We're thinking of leading at around $18M pre, but would love to have [Halfway Capital](funds/halfway-capital) alongside us given your team's depth on the climate infrastructure side — feels like a natural fit. Let me know if it makes sense to get on a call this week before the term sheet window closes.

— Felix
